headline: AbbVie Dermatology Data Sparks Questions On Growth Potential And Valuation
summary: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) is unveiling new Phase 3 data for its dermatology portfolio at a major medical conference. The presentations include first-in-class late-stage systemic treatments for vitiligo and alopecia areata, along with long-term and real-world data on risankizumab and upadacitinib. The update expands AbbVie’s presence in immune-mediated skin diseases and introduces potential new indications within its immunology franchise.
